response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep technical breadth across languages (including C, C++, D, JavaScript/TypeScript), and a proven track record in building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit experience in experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or AI-driven growth systems — key requirements for the role — and his recent career gap and limited enterprise-scale experimentation exposure raise questions about current relevance.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with JavaScript/TypeScript, C, C++, and DLang across high-scale systems
Proven ability to build and lead open-source platforms (GISCollective) and developer tooling
Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and mentoring experience
concerns: No clear evidence of building or leading experimentation, feature flagging, or growth measurement platforms
Recent 1.5-year career gap with no recent production engineering work in growth/AI systems
Limited demonstrated experience with AI tools accelerating engineering velocity or global distributed experimentation systems

key_factors.factor: Career gap and recent production inactivity
